arts.ttl: Oldham battle from behind twice to earn promotion to Football League
arts.sum: In front of a record crowd of 52,115 at Wembley, substitutes James Norwood and Kian Harratt scored within the space of two minutes.

arts.ttl: Oldham Athletic v Southend United: National League playoff final – live
arts.sum: Live playoff final updates from 3pm BST Oldham preview | Southend preview You can email Emillia with your thoughts Our very own Dominic Booth spoke to Southend United head coach Kevin Maher this week ahead of today’s final. As always, I want to hear from you! Where are you watching/reading from? Are you on your way to Wembley? And who are you backing to win this afternoon? Feel free to send me an email.
